questions.question_text: Write comprehensive notes on the morphology of thallus in Algae.
Write comprehensive notes on the alternation of generation in Bryophytes.
Describe significance of various types of abiotic environmental factors for soil formation. Give soil characteristics formed by each agent.
Describe ultra-structure of nucleus with particular reference to nuclear membrane and pore complexes.
Describe various types of environmental pollutions. Give significance of biodiversity and conservation to save the living planet.
Give a diagrammatic account of location of the different photosystems in granum and briefly describe their functions in photosynthesis.
What are different rules of botanical nomenclature? Compare natural and artificial system of classification.
Write short notes on reproduction and economic importance of yeast.
Write short notes on illustrative account of protein synthesis in eukaryotes.
Write short notes on endosperm development in Angiosperms.
